summary: Both REQ-111 and REQ-112 are largely implemented. AppShell.tsx has the music toggle button removed and only retains the dark mode toggle. AppContext.tsx removes isMusicPlaying state and toggleMusic, sets loop=true and volume=1.0, and implements silent autoplay with one-time listener retry. However, there is one notable deviation: the audio source path used is '/assets/Kadhaippoma Oh My Kadavule 128 Kbps.mp3' instead of the required '/assets/music/background.mp3'.

missing_requirements.requirement: The background audio must be sourced from '/assets/music/background.mp3'
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows the Audio instance is constructed with '/assets/Kadhaippoma Oh My Kadavule 128 Kbps.mp3' instead of the specified path '/assets/music/background.mp3'. The requirement explicitly states this path.

hallucinated_features.description: Touchstart event listener added as a third retry trigger for autoplay
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-111 specifies retrying on 'click/keydown on the document' using a one-time event listener. The implementation also adds a 'touchstart' listener, which was not requested.
